configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration sets the MSVC 2022 x64 build environment

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-static
configurePresets.displayName: Enables static C++ libraries for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables static C++ libraries for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-shared
configurePresets.displayName: Enables shared C++ libraries for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables shared C++ libraries for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-tests
configurePresets.displayName: Enables unit tests for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables unit tests for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-cpp-examples
configurePresets.displayName: Enables C++ examples for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables C++ examples for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-python2
configurePresets.displayName: Enables Python2 bindings for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables Python2 bindings for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-python2-examples
configurePresets.displayName: Enables Python2 examples for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables Python2 examples for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-python3
configurePresets.displayName: Enables Python3 bindings for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables Python3 bindings for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-python3-examples
configurePresets.displayName: Enables Python3 examples for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables Python3 examples for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-csharp
configurePresets.displayName: Enables C# bindings for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables C# bindings for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-csharp-examples
configurePresets.displayName: Enables C# examples for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables C# examples for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-docs
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables documentation for MSVC 2022 x64

configurePresets.name: msvc-2022-x64-static-all
configurePresets.displayName: Enables all project options with static C++ library configurations for MSVC 2022 x64
configurePresets.description: This configuration enables all project options with static C++ library configurations for MSVC 2022 x64
